title: Upward Planar Straight-Line Embedding Dataset Schema
description: Schema and field explanation for the UPSE dataset generated over representative point sets of small order types.

scope.embedding_type: Planar straight-line embeddings on fixed point sets
scope.upwardness_model: Upwardness is considered up to rotation of the coordinate system.
scope.point_set_source: Representative point sets from small order-type data.
scope.path_reversal_policy: Undirected path orders are stored once up to reversal.

dataset_file.description: Each nX_upward.json file contains the full dataset for one value of n.

n.description: Number of points in each representative point set.

source_file.description: Path or name of the order-type source file used to generate the dataset.

bits.description: Bit width of the source order-type file, usually 8 for n <= 8.

cycle.description: False for path mode. True only if cycle mode is intentionally used.

algorithm.description: Short label describing the dataset generation algorithm.

path_model.description: Description of how path embeddings are enumerated. In the Chapter 6-aligned dataset, this is undirected plane paths, one representative up to reversal.

num_sets.description: Number of representative point sets included in the file.

set_record.description: A record for one representative point set.

set_id.description: Index of the representative point set within the dataset file.

points.description: List of point coordinates. The index of a point is its position in this list.

num_plane_undirected_paths.description: Number of undirected plane path embeddings for this point set, counted once up to reversal.

total_upward_orientations.description: Total number of upward orientations over all stored plane paths for this point set.

plane_paths.description: List of undirected plane path embeddings on this point set.

plane_path_record.description: A record for one undirected plane path embedding.

path_id.description: Identifier of the plane path within the selected point set.

order_id.description: Identifier of the generated path order, if stored by the dataset builder.

order.description: Point indices along the undirected path.
order.interpretation: The example order [0, 2, 1, 3] means the path visits point 0, then point 2, then point 1, then point 3.

upward_count.description: Number of upward orientations found for this plane path.

upward_orientations.description: List of directed orientations of this path that become upward after rotation of the coordinate system.

upward_orientation_record.description: A record for one upward orientation of a selected plane path.

orientation_id.description: Identifier of the upward orientation within the selected plane path.

dirs.description: Direction string for the path edges. The string length is n - 1 for ordinary paths.

symbols.+: The i-th edge is directed from order[i] to order[i+1].
symbols.-: The i-th edge is directed from order[i+1] to order[i].

up_direction_angle.description: A witness upward direction in the original coordinate system.

rotation_angle.description: A witness rotation angle. Rotating the drawing by this angle displays the selected orientation as upward.

summary_file.description: Each nX_summary.json file contains compact metadata and counts for one value of n.

n.description: Number of points in each representative point set.

status.description: Completion status of the dataset for this value of n.

source_dataset_file.description: Name of the corresponding full dataset JSON file.

source_dataset_size_mb.description: Approximate file size of the full dataset in megabytes.

total_plane_undirected_paths.description: Total number of undirected plane path embeddings over all point sets.

total_upward_orientations.description: Total number of upward orientations over all stored plane paths.

interpretation_notes.fixed_coordinates: The stored coordinates are the original representative point-set coordinates.
interpretation_notes.rotated_witness_view: A selected upward orientation may not look upward in the original coordinate view. Use rotation_angle to display a witness upward drawing.
interpretation_notes.path_order_reversal: The undirected path order and its reverse represent the same embedded path; only one representative is stored.
interpretation_notes.plane_path_condition: Only path orders that pass the straight-line planarity test are stored.
interpretation_notes.direction_string: For an order of length n, dirs has length n - 1 in path mode. Character dirs[i] gives the direction of the edge between order[i] and order[i+1].
